_meta.note: App UI strings (not Satisfactory catalog). Sense-based translation.

dashboard.lead1: FACTORY MANAGER is your local Satisfactory factory planner: item catalog, production chains, and power plans—everything stays on your PC with no account or cloud.
dashboard.lead2: Set output targets, calculate machines, overclock, and power shards, configure miner node extraction, and size generators with the right fuel. The app updates resource and power balances in real time and flags raw-material or fuel shortfalls.
dashboard.lead3: This dashboard is your operational overview: recent projects, critical alerts, production targets, and generator mix—so you know where to act before opening Production or Power.
dashboard.featureResourcesBody: In-game item catalog by type: ores, ingots, fluids, and components.
dashboard.featureProductionBody: Save and reopen factory projects without relying on the cloud.
dashboard.featureEnergyBody: Design extraction and generators to feed your factory.
dashboard.emptyProjectsHint: Create a production chain or power plan to get started.
dashboard.emptyAllOk: All clear — no deficits detected in your projects.

production.title: Production
production.subtitle: Create and manage your custom production plans.
production.emptyListHint: Create your first plan with the «New plan» button.
production.treeViewTitle: View the full chain as a tree graph
production.treeViewGroupsTitle: View the chain by groups (main inputs/outputs only)
production.groupReorderHint: Collapse all groups to reorder them by dragging the handle on the left.
production.emptyResourceSteps: No resource steps. Add the first item to produce.
production.addAnotherExtraction: Add another extraction for this resource

energy.title: Power
energy.subtitle: Create and manage your power production plans.
energy.emptyListHint: Create your first plan with the «New plan» button.
energy.emptyExtractions: No extraction. Add water or coal.
energy.emptyGenerators: No generators. Add a power generator building.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Local data management and restore of the default resource catalog.
settings.baseDataLead: The item catalog, buildings, and production recipes are bundled with the app. On a new PC they are populated automatically on first launch.
settings.restoreBody: Reload resources, buildings (including Somersloop slots), and recipes from the bundled data. Manual edits to names and categories will be lost.
settings.envLead: Technical information about the app and local database.
settings.restoreSuccess: Restore complete: {items} resources, {buildings} buildings, {schemas} production recipes.

footer.disclaimer: Factory Manager is an independent, unofficial fan-made tool for planning Satisfactory production. Factory Manager is not affiliated with, sponsored, approved, supported, or authorized by Coffee Stain Studios. Satisfactory, its trademarks, logos, images, icons, resources, machines, recipes, data, and other content belong to Coffee Stain Studios AB and/or their respective owners. The Factory Manager developers claim no rights to game content.

modals.selectSchemaAltHint: This resource has alternate recipes. Choose which to use.
modals.detailNoSchemas: No production recipes registered for this resource.

legal.title: Legal information, attributions, and disclaimer
legal.sectionAbout.title: Factory Manager
legal.sectionAbout.p1: Factory Manager is independent, unofficial fan-made software developed as a companion tool for Satisfactory players.
legal.sectionAbout.p2: The app helps you calculate and visualize production chains from the game, including resource quantities, recipes, cycle times, inputs, outputs, consumption, machine counts, and layout organization.
legal.sectionIndependence.title: Independent, unofficial project
legal.sectionIndependence.p1: Factory Manager is not developed, published, sponsored, approved, supported, or authorized by Coffee Stain Studios AB, Coffee Stain Publishing AB, or other companies in the Coffee Stain group.
legal.sectionIndependence.p2: Using the software does not create any commercial, corporate, contractual, professional, or partnership relationship between the Factory Manager developers and Coffee Stain Studios.
legal.sectionIndependence.p3: Factory Manager is an autonomous community project created by enthusiasts for informational and support purposes.
legal.sectionIp.title: Intellectual property
legal.sectionIp.p1: Satisfactory, its name, trademarks, logos, images, icons, artwork, resources, machines, buildings, items, production elements, recipes, names, data, design, and all other original content from the game belong to Coffee Stain Studios AB and/or their respective owners and licensors.
legal.sectionIp.p2: All rights in such materials remain with their respective owners.
legal.sectionIp.p3: The Factory Manager developers do not claim ownership of any Satisfactory content.
legal.sectionIp.p4: Any use within the software of names, images, icons, resources, machines, production elements, recipes, data, or other game references is solely for informational, descriptive, illustrative, and gameplay-identification purposes.
legal.sectionIp.p5: Original code, the interface, technical structure, calculation system, and features built specifically for Factory Manager belong to their respective authors, subject to all rights in Satisfactory content and other third-party materials.
legal.sectionName.title: Use of the name Satisfactory
legal.sectionName.p1: The name Satisfactory is used only to identify the game Factory Manager works with and to describe the software's purpose.
legal.sectionName.p2: This use does not imply any affiliation, authorization, sponsorship, or approval by Coffee Stain Studios.
legal.sectionName.p3: Satisfactory is not the primary name of the software and is not used to present Factory Manager as an official product.
legal.sectionFunction.title: What the software does
legal.sectionFunction.p1: Factory Manager is strictly an external planning aid.
legal.sectionFunction.item1: does not replace the original game;
legal.sectionFunction.item2: does not let you play Satisfactory;
legal.sectionFunction.item3: does not provide free access to the game;
legal.sectionFunction.item4: does not distribute copies of the game;
legal.sectionFunction.item5: does not modify game files directly;
legal.sectionFunction.item6: does not contain code required to run Satisfactory;
legal.sectionFunction.item7: is not required to use the original game.
legal.sectionFunction.p3: To play Satisfactory you must purchase and own the game through official channels.
legal.sectionAccuracy.title: Data accuracy
legal.sectionAccuracy.p1: Factory Manager is provided as a support tool and may contain errors, omissions, approximations, malfunctions, or outdated data.
legal.sectionAccuracy.p2: Game updates, recipe changes, balance tweaks, new versions, or new Satisfactory content may temporarily make some information inaccurate.
legal.sectionAccuracy.p3: The developers do not guarantee that all data, calculations, plans, or results from the software are always complete, correct, up to date, or compatible with the latest game version.
legal.sectionAccuracy.p4: You are encouraged to verify results yourself and use the software at your own risk.
legal.sectionLiability.title: Limitation of liability
legal.sectionLiability.p1: To the extent permitted by law, the Factory Manager developers shall not be liable for any:
legal.sectionLiability.item9: consequences arising from use or inability to use the software.
legal.sectionLiability.p2: The software is provided without express or implied warranties regarding operation, accuracy, or fitness for a particular purpose, to the extent allowed by applicable law.
legal.sectionRights.title: Rights holder notices
legal.sectionRights.p1: If a rights holder believes content in Factory Manager infringes their intellectual property, they may contact the developers with:
legal.sectionRights.p2: Legitimate reports will be reviewed and, when necessary, affected content may be corrected, replaced, or removed.
legal.sectionRights.p3: Satisfactory and all related trademarks, logos, images, assets, and content belong to Coffee Stain Studios AB and/or their respective owners.

graph.emptyGroups: No nodes to show in the group tree.
graph.emptyGroup: No nodes to show in group «{name}».
graph.emptyTree: No nodes to show. Add extractions or resource steps.
